name: Domain Event
description: Hierarchical structure of a CloudEvents-compliant domain event for event-driven microservice architectures.

fields.name: id
fields.description: Unique UUID identifier for this event occurrence.

fields.name: source
fields.description: URI of the originating service context.

fields.name: type
fields.description: Event type in reverse-DNS notation (e.g., com.example.orders.created).

fields.name: subject
fields.description: Entity ID or subject the event is about (e.g., order-12345).

fields.name: datacontenttype
fields.description: MIME type of the event data payload.

fields.name: dataschema
fields.description: URI of the schema definition for the event data.

fields.name: time
fields.description: RFC3339 timestamp of when the event occurred.

fields.name: data
fields.description: Event-type-specific payload carrying the domain data.

fields.name: partitionkey
fields.description: Kafka partition key for ordered event delivery.

fields.name: causationid
fields.description: ID of the event or command that caused this event.

fields.name: metadata
fields.description: Operational metadata for routing, retries, and dead letter handling.

fields.name: deadLetterQueue
fields.description: Whether the event was moved to DLQ.
